Thank you and congratulations on signing up to join us for [PROGRAM TITLE]!

We will soon be contacting you with all the program details - dates, downloads, shipping information, etc. via email so watch your inbox over the coming days.

Again, congratulations on deciding to become part of this program.



Sincerely,
